message:
refactor(gateway): pass driver to handleAgentEvents instead of stream

Updates agent event handling to pass the driver instance and create
the subscription internally with an AbortSignal for proper cleanup.

Problem:
The previous pattern passed a pre-created AsyncIterable to the event
handler, which couldn't be cancelled. This caused issues with the new
AbortSignal-based subscription model.

Solution:
- Pass AgentDriver to handleAgentEvents instead of the event stream
- Create subscription inside the handler with the AbortController signal
- Remove unused AgentEvent import (now internal to handler)

This ensures subscriptions are properly tied to the abort controller
lifecycle and can be cancelled cleanly during shutdown or errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
